rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal reductions and has no nexus to Educ. Code §21.553, which governs financial incentives for educator certification pilot program participants.
quote: Sec. 21.553. FINANCIAL INCENTIVES. (a) The pilot program must offer to participants financial incentives, including tuition assistance and loan forgiveness.
_note: No relationship between proposed change and this statute; rule_text addresses educator certification incentives only.
